code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function ProposalsList(){const[proposals,setProposals]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{fetchProposals();},[]);const fetchProposals=async()=>{try{const token=localStorage.getItem('access');const response=await axios.get('http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/proposals/',{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});setProposals(response.data);setLoading(false);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching proposals:',error);setLoading(false);}};if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>navigate(-1),style:{marginBottom:"20px"},children:"\u2190 Back"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"My Proposals"}),proposals.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No proposals found."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"project-grid",children:proposals.map(proposal=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"project-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:["Project: ",proposal.project_title]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Bid Amount:"})," \u20B9",proposal.bid_amount]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Estimated Days:"})," ",proposal.estimated_days," days"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Status:"})," ",proposal.status]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>navigate("/projects/".concat(proposal.project)),children:"View Project"})]},proposal.id))})]});}export default ProposalsList;
